metadata.task_title: Copy text from Word to the Notes section in Powerpoint
metadata.instruction: Copy presentation notes from word document located in Task ID 55.docx to my presentation slide Task ID 55.pptx, both in Documents > Task 55 folder.
metadata.context: I’m giving a presentation tomorrow and I want to move my talking points from a word document to the Notes section of my presentation.

l3.rationale: Open File Explorer from the pinned taskbar button.

l4.rationale: Opened File Explorer and browsed to the Documents > Task 55 folder to reach the needed file location.

l5.rationale: Uses Navigate/Application and Navigate/Text Document to open the Word file in Documents > Task 55, which contains the notes to copy.

l3.rationale: Open the Documents location from the navigation pane.

l5.rationale: Uses Navigate/Application and Navigate/Text Document to open the Word file in Documents > Task 55, which contains the notes to copy.

l3.rationale: Activate the PowerPoint workspace area.

l4.rationale: Changed PowerPoint into notes-focused views by toggling the Notes pane and opening Notes Page view.

l5.rationale: Uses View/Presentation and Navigate/Presentation to bring up the slide and place focus in the Notes area before editing.

l3.rationale: Toggle the Notes pane in PowerPoint.

l4.rationale: Changed PowerPoint into notes-focused views by toggling the Notes pane and opening Notes Page view.

l5.rationale: Uses View/Presentation and Navigate/Presentation to bring up the slide and place focus in the Notes area before editing.
